title: Section 5
content: Whoever counterfeits any grade designation mark or has in his possession any die, plate or other instrument for the purpose of counterfeiting a grade designation mark shall be punishable 1[with imprisonment for a term not exceeding exceeding three years and fine not exceeding five thousand rupees].
footnote: 1 Subs. by s. 6, ibid., for "with imprisonment which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both" (w.e.f. 15-4-1987).
